description:
Ingestd batch processing statistics

Emitted after each batch is processed by the `JetStream` consumer.
Captures throughput, latency, and schema validation coverage data for batch processing.

batch_size.description: Number of events in this batch

fetch_to_ack_ms.description: Time from fetch to ack in milliseconds

had_synthesis.description: Whether this batch contained synthesis events

suspicious_future_ts_orig.description: Cumulative count of events whose `ts_orig` is implausibly far in the future.

validation_coverage_pct.description: Schema coverage percentage: events with a schema / total validated (excluding skipped)

validation_invalid.description: Cumulative count of events that failed schema validation

validation_no_schema.description: Cumulative count of events with no registered schema

validation_schema_not_found.description: Cumulative count of events whose schema was not found in the registry

validation_skipped.description: Cumulative count of events where validation was skipped (disabled)

validation_valid.description: Cumulative count of events that passed schema validation

title: IngestdBatchStatsPayload
